ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "disease_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the disease */,
  "disease_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the disease */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_lines" (
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "cell_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell line */,
  "cell_line_source" TEXT /* Source of the cell line */,
  "cell_line_passage_number" INTEGER /* Passage number of the cell line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "instrument_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "instrument_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of instrument calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* User's institution */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  "user_lab" TEXT /* User's laboratory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_samples" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the samples table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "data_file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "data_file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data file */,
  "data_file_sample" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the samples table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "analysis_result_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_result_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_result_data_file" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data files table */,
  "analysis_result_experiment" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_result_data_file FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_result_data_file") REFERENCES data_files ("data_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_result_experiment FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_result_experiment") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Foreign key referencing the samples table
